---
title: "Shiny Reactivity"
---

:::{.column-page-inset-right}

{{< revealjs file="/slides/04-reactivity.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

:::

# Slide Contents

{{< include /slides/04-reactivity.qmd >}}

# Demo: shared `@reactive.calc`

`code/app-03-reactivity.py` — species filter shared between a scatter plot and a count.

:::{.column-page-inset}

```{shinylive-python}
#| standalone: true
#| components: [editor, viewer]

{{< include /../code/demos/app-03-reactivity.py >}}
```

:::

# Demo: chained `@reactive.calc`

`code/app-04-reactivity_chained.py` — `summary()` derives from `filtered()`, feeding a third output.
Change **Y Axis** and watch the count stay unchanged — `filtered()` is still cached.

:::{.column-page-inset}

```{shinylive-python}
#| standalone: true
#| components: [editor, viewer]

{{< include /../code/demos/app-04-reactivity_chained.py >}}
```

:::
